_instructions: Add new customer stories here. Each story auto-renders on stories.html. For photos: put image files in /images/stories/. For videos: paste a YouTube/Vimeo embed URL. All fields except id, name, and quote are optional.

stories.name: Ana
stories.piece_zh: 定制蝴蝶兰耳饰 — 蓝与粉
stories.quote: Those are the colors of my eyes.
stories.story: She was a Spanish pianist living in Manhattan, far from home. She stopped by chance near the cherry blossoms of Central Park and saw the silk orchid earrings. She pointed to the ones with pale blue petals and the faintest blush at the edges — colors of a Mediterranean sunrise — and said: 'Those are the colors of my eyes.' She is the reason the Eye Color Collection exists.
stories.story_zh: 她是一位住在曼哈顿的西班牙女钢琴演奏家，离家千里。她偶然经过中央公园的樱花树下，看到了丝绸兰花耳饰。她指向那对淡蓝花瓣、边缘带着极淡粉色的耳饰——地中海日出的颜色——说：'那是我眼睛的颜色。'她，是眼色系列存在的原因。
